exercises.title: Union-Find Data Structure
exercises.description: Implement the Union-Find data structure with optimizations.
tasks: Implement union() with union by rank
Add method to check if two elements are connected
hints: Path compression: point directly to root during find
Union by rank: attach smaller tree to larger
Initialize parent[i] = i for all i
Rank only increases when merging equal-rank trees

exercises.title: Cluster Growth Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate cluster growth on a surface code lattice.
tasks: Create lattice with defects at given positions
hints: Each cluster tracks its boundary edges
Merge when both clusters half-cover same edge

exercises.title: Complete Union-Find Decoder
exercises.description: Implement the full Union-Find decoder for surface codes.
tasks: Extract correction from final cluster state
hints: Correction = edges in odd-odd merged pairs

exercises.title: Performance Comparison
exercises.description: Compare Union-Find and MWPM decoder performance.
tasks: Run both decoders on same syndromes
